properties.name: ModelAbsoluteTolerance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model space absolute tolerance.

properties.name: ModelAngleToleranceDegrees
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model space angle tolerance.

properties.name: ModelAngleToleranceRadians
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model space angle tolerance.

properties.name: ModelBasepoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model base point that is used when the file is read as an instance definition. This point is mapped to the origin in the instance definition.

properties.name: ModelRelativeTolerance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model space relative tolerance.

properties.name: ModelUnitSystem
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model unit system, using UnitSystem enumeration.

properties.name: ModelUrl
properties.summary: Gets or sets a Uniform Resource Locator (URL) direction for the model.

properties.name: PageAbsoluteTolerance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the page space absolute tolerance.

properties.name: PageAngleToleranceDegrees
properties.summary: Gets or sets the page space angle tolerance.

properties.name: PageAngleToleranceRadians
properties.summary: Gets or sets the page space angle tolerance.

properties.name: PageRelativeTolerance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the page space relative tolerance.

properties.name: PageUnitSystem
properties.summary: Gets or sets the page unit system, using UnitSystem enumeration.
